name: @rakelabs/klescrow-sdk
description: npm SDK for Klescrow escrow workflows

scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node --import tsx/esm --test --test-concurrency=1 test/e2e/klescrow.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-error-decoder.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-txbuilder.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-reader.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-events.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-golden.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-multicall.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:ci: npm run build && node --test dist/test/*.test.js && node --import tsx/esm --test --test-concurrency=1 test/e2e/klescrow.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-error-decoder.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-txbuilder.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-reader.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-events.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-golden.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/klescrow-multicall.e2e.test.ts && KLESCROW_E2E_DOCKER_IMAGE=cartel-hardhat:mock node --import tsx/esm --test --test-concurrency=1 test/e2e/klescrow-dispute.e2e.test.ts
